abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} at night by sending your owl to soar, roll +their health. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} against an ambush in darkness, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
When you make a move by leveraging your owl’s secret knowledge to partake in something akin to the mystic, add +1 or take +1 momentum on a hit (decide before rolling).

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death}, take your owl’s presence circles above the threshold, weaving hope and memory into the fabric of fate; take +momentum equal to their health before you roll. On a strong hit, mark 2 ticks on your bonds legacy track.
